description: Inter-agent message schema for MayaOS V2 partial. All agents communicate using this exact shape.

msg_id.description: Unique message identifier. UUID or incrementing per-sender counter.

from.description: Sender agent_id. Must be a valid registered agent.

to.description: Recipient agent_id. Use 'broadcast' for division-wide or system-wide alerts.

type.description: request: asking for something. response: answering a prior request. broadcast: informational, no answer expected. alert: high-priority broadcast.

data.description: Free-form payload data specific to the intent.

context_refs.description: Optional list of file paths or memory IDs the recipient should consult.

requires_response.description: If true, the recipient must enqueue an outbox response. If false, no reply expected.
